history.subject: Beck-Chevalley intertwining CLOSED: pullback_app_isoTensor_baseMap_sectionLinearEquiv proved axiom-clean via the 6-stage chain (step2 Sigma-inverse, N1 naturality + step1 Sigma-identity, N2 pullbackComp twice, N3 pullbackCongr, N4 step3-inversion). The affine-open section formula Gamma(g^*N, U) = Gamma(Y,U) tensor Gamma(N,V) and its IsBaseChange packaging are now sorry-free; QuotScheme sorries 9 -> 8 (remaining: 5 headline + 3 flatness-gated canonicalBaseChangeMap-isIso). Blueprint: N1-N4 nodes leanok with corrected lean-pointers, stage section updated
Blueprint: fix malformed lem:pullback_tildeIso header (Stacks 01HQ node)

FlatteningStratification: repair 3 false statements (genericFlatness +QuasiCompact, flatLocusStratification flat-over-stratum, universal property bundled with existence via coproduct factorization); prove flatteningStratification + flatLocusAssembly from flatLocusReduction; land the full generic-freeness dévissage layer (GenericallyFree, splicing via free_shortExact, localization transport, torsion base case, prime-filtration assembly genericFlatnessAlgebraic) with the Noether-normalisation domain core as the single new typed sorry

Blueprint FlatteningStratification: sync repaired statements (generic flatness quasi-compactness with counterexample, universal property bundled with existence via stratum coproduct); add the generic-freeness dévissage subsection (GenericallyFree, transport, splicing, torsion base case, finite-module cases, normalisation core with full Nitsure proof) re-pinning thm:generic_flatness_algebraic from TODO to the real Lean assembly; honest proof environments for the Lean-helper nodes

Blueprint QuotScheme: ground the 12 dangling union-merge/section-localization labels in real sorry-free Lean decls (gap1 isIso_fromTildeGamma_of_isQuasicoherent, gap2 basicOpen localization, descent chain, powers transport, annihilator localization, over-restrict equivalence), each axiom-verified with complete proofs and Stacks 01I8 sources; closes the I-0087 dangling-cref set
FlatteningStratification: fix stale ofCurve docstring (corollary is proved, not a sorry)

Prove finite generation of affine sections of a finitely presented module sheaf (Stacks 01PC, finite-type half): for F of finite presentation and V an affine open inside a presenting-cover member, Γ(F,V) is a finite Γ(X,V)-module. The generating sections of the slice F|_{X_i} geometrize across the slice equivalence, pull back to Spec Γ(X,V) along the factorization of fromSpec, land on tilde Γ(F,V) by the 01I8 identification, and a finite generating epimorphism onto a tilde forces finite generation of the module because the tilde–Γ counit at a tilde is invertible and tilde is faithful (module_finite_of_tilde_genSections, module_finite_sections_of_quasicoherentData, exists_affine_finite_sections_nhds in Picard/QuotScheme.lean). Chart supply for Nitsure §4 generic flatness.

Prove geometric generic flatness (Nitsure §4): over an integral locally noetherian base S, a finitely presented module sheaf on a finite-type X → S has flat sections over all affine pairs below a non-empty V = D(f). New file Picard/GenericFlatnessGeometric.lean: the mixed-base stability lemma Module.Flat.of_isLocalizedModule_algebra (flatness over the base survives localizing at a fibre-algebra submonoid — axiom-clean, closes a Mathlib gap), the chart-basic core (chart freeness at g localizes to any basic open above D(g), via the qcqs section-localization engine and base-ring descent), and the two-layer basic-open reduction via Module.flat_of_isLocalized_span plus two flat_iff_of_isLocalization exchanges. genericFlatness's own proof is complete and kernel-checked; it is conditional (sorryAx) only through genericFlatnessAlgebraic, whose r3 induction proof (session 0027, ended at rate limit, integrated unverified) fails the batch kernel build at three localized-module instance walls and is honestly re-opened as a documented typed sorry (r3 text preserved in ledger 6c30537; its sub-lemma layer survives kernel-checked). FlatteningStratification.lean stays Mathlib-only-imports so its heavy dévissage proofs keep their instance environment.

Blueprint: geometric-glue chapter for generic flatness and the affine finite-sections cluster. Picard_FlatteningStratification.tex gains six glue nodes (mixed-base flatness stability, two appLE restriction compatibilities, section-flatness transport, chart-basic core, two-layer basic-open reduction — all \leanok with complete proofs) and thm:generic_flatness gets its real proof (chart supply + per-chart generic freeness + product denominator + the reduction), statement-\leanok only since its cone runs through the re-opened algebraic core; also fixes the malformed theorem header. Picard_QuotScheme.tex gains the Stacks 01PC finite-type cluster (finite generation from a finite generating family of a tilde via the tilde–Γ adjunction; the chart form over a presenting cover member; the affine-neighbourhood chart supply), all \leanok.
